items.title: OG finishing what Aaron Nesmith and Andrew Nembhard started last year
items.author: Jason Patt
items.body_excerpt: OG finishing what Aaron Nesmith and Andrew Nembhard started last year

items.title: Andrew Nembhard: "I think I've always been a guy who tries to lead by example and go out there and show I can compete. But I think this year I was put in a position where I had to voice my opinion more, kind of rally the troops in a way."
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Andrew Nembhard: "I think I've always been a guy who tries to lead by example and go out there and show I can compete. But I think this year I was put in a position where I had to voice my opinion more, kind of rally the troops in a way."

More: www.circlecityspin.com/debrief-andr...
